moments.title: Wimbledon Fortnight
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament is underway in London, with all eyes on SW19 for two weeks of grass-court action, running until July 12.

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Strawberries & Cream season is officially here! Who's your pick for the Wimbledon title this year?

angles.name: First Week Drama
angles.copy: The first week of Wimbledon is always full of upsets and new stars emerging. Catch all the action from SW19.

moments.title: Happy 81st, Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: The iconic frontwoman of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still effortlessly cool, still a legend. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Blondie Hits
angles.copy: The voice behind 'Heart of Glass' and 'Call Me' turns 81 today! Sending birthday wishes to Debbie Harry.

moments.title: Love Island Drama Heats Up
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK, which started on June 1st, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with new arrivals, recouplings, and plenty of villa drama keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Are you keeping up with all the drama in the Love Island villa? Who's your favourite couple (or biggest troublemaker) so far?

angles.name: Bombshell Alerts
angles.copy: Another night, another bombshell! Love Island is delivering all the twists and turns this week.

moments.title: Summer Weather Arrives
moments.blurb: The UK is set for a spell of warm, sunny weather this week, with temperatures rising as summer truly begins.

angles.name: Sun's Out
angles.copy: Sun's out, shades on! Looks like proper summer weather is finally here across the UK this week. How are you making the most of it?

angles.name: BBQ Time
angles.copy: Time to dust off the BBQ! We're in for a lovely few days of sunshine. What's your go-to summer tune?

moments.title: Vince Clarke Turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday this Friday, July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: From Depeche Mode to Erasure, Vince Clarke's synth magic turns 66 on Friday! What's your top track from his incredible career?

angles.name: Erasure Hits
angles.copy: Happy 66th to the legendary Vince Clarke this Friday! Creator of some of the greatest 80s electronic hits.

moments.title: Tour de France Begins
moments.blurb: The world's biggest cycling race, the Tour de France, begins this Saturday, July 4th, in Barcelona, with riders battling for the yellow jersey over three weeks.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The Grand Départ is almost here! The Tour de France rolls out from Barcelona this Saturday. Who are you backing for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of gruelling climbs and sprint finishes as the Tour de France gets underway this weekend!

moments.title: New Official Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will be updated this Friday, July 4th, revealing the new number one and biggest climbers.

angles.name: Who's #1?
angles.copy: Who's going to claim the top spot this week? The Official Singles Chart gets a refresh this Friday!

angles.name: Chart Climbers
angles.copy: Will your favourite track climb the charts or reach number one? Find out when the new Official Singles Chart drops on Friday.

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum rapper and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your all-time favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent this Monday! Still got 'In Da Club' on repeat.

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr this Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday! Send your birthday wishes to the Beatle.

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning alternative rock artist Beck celebrates his 56th birthday on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Versatile Artist
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the incredibly versatile Beck this Wednesday! From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', what's your top track?

angles.name: Eclectic Career
angles.copy: The unique sound of Beck turns 56 on Wednesday! Celebrate with your favourite tune from his eclectic career.

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love this Thursday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Hole Frontwoman
angles.copy: Rock legend Courtney Love turns 62 on Thursday. Celebrating the fierce frontwoman today!

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins with practice days on July 12th, ahead of the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is almost here! The Open Championship practice days kick off this Sunday at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale next week for The Open. Who do you think will lift the Claret Jug?
